prestige-tower.title: REAL ESTATE SALES WEBSITE — PRESTIGE TOWER
prestige-tower.projects_desc: This is a modern class 'A' business center, designed according to the latest world-standard technologies

technology.introduction: When creating the website and mobile application for Alpha Cargo, we focused on modern technologies that provide high performance, ease of maintenance, and scalability flexibility.
technology.frontend: For the frontend, we chose <bold>React</bold> and <bold>TypeScript</bold>. This stack allowed us to create an intuitive interface that easily adapts to different devices, whether mobile phones or computers.
technology.backend: On the backend, we used <bold>Node.js</bold> and <bold>NestJS</bold>. This combination provided:

backendBenefits.point1: High performance thanks to Node.js architecture.
backendBenefits.point2: Clear code structure and easy scalability with NestJS.

item1.title: Development of API for complex processes.
item1.description: We implemented a RESTful API with clear separation of responsibilities.

item2.title: Data security.
item2.description: We used advanced approaches, including tokenization, encryption, and secure connections.

item3.title: Working with geolocation and maps.
item3.description: We implemented maps with real-time cargo tracking capabilities.

item4.title: Processing large volumes of data.
item4.description: We used NestJS microservice architecture to distribute the load.

item5.title: Compatibility and support for different versions.
item5.description: We conducted multiple tests to ensure stable operation.

technology.conclusion: We thoroughly studied the needs of Alpha Cargo, as well as the requests of their clients, to offer optimal solutions that meet the high standards of the industry.

about.title: ABOUT THE PROJECT
about.description: Alpha Cargo is a leader in the market of clothing and textile transportation from Kyrgyzstan to Russia. Together, we developed a digital ecosystem for clients, including a modern website and mobile application that simplify the process of sending, tracking, and paying for cargo.
about.steps: Now users can go through the entire delivery process in just a few steps:

stepsList.step1: Submit a cargo pickup request with convenient geolocation.
stepsList.step4: Store, download, and manage all documentation in the personal account.

about.results: Since the beginning of 2024, thanks to the implementation of new technologies and digitalization of processes, interest in Alpha Cargo services has significantly increased. Clients note the convenience of using the platform and the ability to resolve all transportation-related issues in one place.

projectData.task: In 2024, Alpha Cargo approached us with the task of developing a modern website and mobile application that would simplify client interaction with the cargo transportation service. The goal was to create a convenient digital platform for tracking shipments, paying for services, managing documents, and interacting with company managers. We thoroughly studied the needs of Alpha Cargo, as well as the requests of their clients, to offer optimal solutions that meet the high standards of the industry.

result.mainText: We developed a website and mobile application with extensive functionality, providing:

features.list1: Client's personal account, where they can:
features.list2: Track shipment status in real-time. Manage invoices and view shipment history.
features.list3: Make quick online payments for services. Request an on-site team for cargo pickup.
features.list4: Integration with the company's CRM system for automating internal management processes
features.list5: Full adaptability of the website and application for convenient use on any devices
features.list6: Ability to receive notifications about shipment status and company promotions

result.mainText2: To enhance interaction with clients, we implemented a stories feature in the app, where users can receive updates on Alpha Cargo's news, discounts, and new services.

technicalDetails.title: Technical Features

features.list1: A user-friendly interface was developed with an emphasis on speed and ease of interaction
features.list2: An analytics system was implemented to track user behavior for further service improvement
features.list3: Integration with payment systems for secure and convenient transactions
features.list4: Offline functionality: clients can save information and work with it without an internet connection

technicalDetails.title2: We thoroughly studied the needs of Alpha Cargo, as well as the requests of their clients, to offer optimal solutions that meet the high standards of the industry.

about.title: ABOUT THE PROJECT
about.description: Only Work is an innovative platform for workforce management. The main goal was to create a solution that helps businesses easily and efficiently track employees' working hours, generate detailed reports, and enhance transparency and productivity within companies.

developmentProcess.introduction: Development process. For the implementation of the project, we used the following technologies:

technologies.frontend: Vue.js – for creating a fast and intuitive interface.
technologies.backend: .NET and C# – for building a scalable and high-performance server application.

steps.analysisAndDesign: A deep analysis of user needs was conducted. Prototypes of modules were created: time tracking, dashboards, reporting, and analytics system.
steps.backendDevelopment: .NET and C# enabled the implementation of a high-performance server with a flexible architecture. The system was built using REST API, ensuring stable integration between the server and client side. Geolocation functions and real-time data verification were integrated.
steps.frontendDevelopment: Vue.js ensured simplicity in development and interface adaptability. The entire user interface was designed with a focus on usability and quick access to key features. Several custom components were created for data visualization: charts, interactive tables, and filters.
steps.moduleIntegration: The time tracking module was synchronized with reports and analytics to ensure real-time data display. Push notifications were added to remind employees about the start/end of the workday.
steps.testingAndOptimization: Multi-level testing of backend and frontend parts was carried out. The application was optimized to ensure stability as the number of users increased.

projectDetails.description: In 2024, ILDEV began work on the Only Work project – an innovative platform for workforce management. The main goal was to create a solution that helps businesses easily and efficiently track employees' working hours, generate detailed reports, and enhance transparency and productivity within companies.

features.list1: Develop an application for employee time tracking with precise clock-in and clock-out functionality.
features.list2: Ensure automatic report generation for any period.
features.list3: Implement analytics functions to identify areas for efficiency improvement.
features.list4: Create a user-friendly interface for employees, HR, and management.

features.list1: Transparent time tracking. Companies received a tool that minimizes errors in work hour accounting and improves employee discipline.
features.list2: Time savings on report preparation. The system automated report generation, allowing HR and managers to focus on more important tasks.
features.list3: Increased productivity. Analytical data helped businesses better understand how working hours are distributed and make changes to improve efficiency.
features.list4: User-friendly interface. Only Work received positive feedback for its ease of use and simple integration into business processes.
features.list5: Scalability flexibility. The product was developed to meet the needs of both small and large businesses, making it a universal solution for various companies.

frontend.title: Vue.js for creating a user-friendly interface.

backend.title: .NET and C# for a scalable server architecture.

list1.title: Analysis and Design
list1.description: An audit of the current business processes of Brand Fabrica was conducted. A prototype interface was created with modules: product catalog, order management system, and reporting.

list2.title: Backend Development
list2.description: .NET and C# were used to implement a centralized order processing system. A pricing calculation system was integrated, considering options such as quantity, design, and materials. Inventory management was synchronized with the order system.

list3.title: Frontend Development
list3.description: Vue.js enabled the creation of an intuitive interface for wholesale buyers. Features for uploading custom logos, selecting designs, and previewing were added.

list4.title: Delivery System Integration
list4.description: Integration of transport company APIs for cost and delivery time calculation. Order tracking in the user account.

list5.title: Testing and Optimization
list5.description: Module testing eliminated errors in mass orders. Page load times and large data processing were optimized.

data.task: In 2024, ILDEV began developing the Brand Fabrica platform, designed for the production and wholesale sale of branded clothing. The main goal of the project is to simplify interactions with customers from Russia and Kazakhstan, automate order management, and integrate key processes into a single solution.

features.list1: Create a platform for online orders of branded clothing.
features.list2: Implement an order management module, including design selection, cost calculation, and delivery management.
features.list3: Develop an analytics system for production control.
features.list4: Provide real-time access to product availability information.

features.list1: Customer convenience. Users can complete orders entirely online, including design, cost calculation, and payment.
features.list2: Business process automation. Order management and inventory control are simplified.
features.list3: Faster order fulfillment. Thanks to production integration, order processing time was reduced by 30%.
features.list4: Scalability. The platform is adapted to support large clients with high order volumes.
features.list5: Sales growth. The intuitive system increased wholesale order volume by 25% within the first few months of operation.

aboutProject.title: ABOUT THE PROJECT
aboutProject.description: Brand Fabrica is a specialized platform designed to automate the production and wholesale sales of branded clothing. The project was developed to simplify interactions with clients from Russia and Kazakhstan. The main focus is on integrating all stages, from design selection and ordering to the delivery of finished products. The company ILDEV took on the task of modernizing the production process by creating a digital ecosystem.

cargosystem.desc: Cargo System is a digital platform developed to automate the logistics processes of the company Alpha Cargo. The main goal of the project was to create a transportation management system and a user-friendly interface for clients and employees.
cargosystem.tasks: ILDEV developed Cargo System to automate the logistics processes of Alpha Cargo, one of the largest players in the cargo transportation market from Kyrgyzstan to Russia. The main goal was to create a platform for managing shipments, tracking parcels, and providing convenient client interactions.

firstblock.list1: Create a personal account for clients to manage their shipments.
firstblock.list2: Develop a module for tracking cargo statuses.
firstblock.list4: Integrate APIs to work with transport companies and insurance partners.

secondblock.list1: Improving service quality. Clients gained access to a convenient personal account with full shipment control functions.
secondblock.list2: Accelerating order processing. Order processing time was reduced by 40%.
secondblock.list3: Increasing transparency. The ability to track cargo statuses in real-time increased customer trust.
secondblock.list4: Stability and scalability. The platform successfully serves both private clients and corporate partners.
secondblock.list5: Cost reduction. Automation reduced operational process costs by 20%.

proccess.text: The following were used for implementation:
proccess.frontend: Vue.js for creating an interactive interface.
proccess.backend: .NET and C# for data processing and logistics management.
proccess.analithe: Key system functions were defined: cargo tracking, online payment, tariff calculation. Prototypes of the personal account and employee interface were developed.
proccess.devback: .NET and C# were used to build a robust backend. A REST API structure was implemented for integration with internal systems. Modules for cost calculation and cargo insurance were added.
proccess.devfront: Vue.js provided a dynamic and user-friendly interface. Implemented functions for generating invoices and courier request submissions.
proccess.request: Synchronized information with the warehouse system and GPS tracking. Added real-time delivery time calculation.
proccess.qa: Testing was conducted at all stages of the logistics process. Load time was optimized for high-volume operations.

projectData.task: In 2024, Prestige Tower approached us with the task of creating a website for real estate sales and rentals. The goal was to combine all necessary tools in one place for clients interested in buying or renting housing, as well as for property owners looking to list their advertisements. We enthusiastically took on the work, thoroughly studied the client's needs, conducted market analysis, and proposed a solution that met contemporary UX/UI and functionality standards.

result.mainText: We developed an intuitive and functional website where users can:

features.list1: Browse available real estate properties with options to select floor, office, and other parameters.
features.list2: Obtain detailed information about each property with descriptions.
features.list3: Easily connect with company representatives through an integrated messenger or feedback form.

result.mainText2: Moreover, inquiries from the site are sent to a Telegram bot, allowing Prestige Tower to process requests quickly.

technicalDetails.title: Technological Features

features.list1: Modern design aligned with the Prestige Tower brand, emphasizing simplicity and elegance.
features.list2: Full website adaptability for correct display on all devices, including mobile phones and tablets.
features.list3: Implementation of a property map with geolocation for convenient business center search.
features.list4: Integration with the client's CRM system to automate request processing.

technicalDetails.title2: The project was successfully completed on time, and the website received positive user reviews while increasing client flow for Prestige Tower. We are proud to have created a digital platform that effectively solves the client's tasks and helps them develop their business.
